entry.title: New: CR 24-79 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 23, CD1 (2024), to grant a Community Plan Amendment for 268.349 acres of real property identified as tax map keys (2) 4-9-001:021, 024, 030; (2) 4-9-002:001 (por.), 061 (pors.); (2) 4-9-018:002 (pors.), 003 (pors.), 005; and (2) 4-9-021:009, located in Lānaʻi City, Lānaʻi, Hawaiʻi, by adding acreage, removing existing acreage, and adjusting the specific land uses within the Lānaʻi Community Plan designation.

Housing and Land Use Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
